name: Split Canvas
description: Two-tone canvas: warm peach + cool lavender as paired surfaces. Outfit sans display, magenta accent. Signature: dual-tone surface (left peach / right lavender) — built for contrast and dialog chapters.
descriptionZh: 双色画布：暖蜜桃 + 冷薰衣草作为成对底色 + Outfit 几何无衬线 + 玫红强调。签名：双调底色（左桃 / 右紫），适合做对照与对话型章节。
